payload.answer: This looks like a transient observation rather than durable personal memory. Please choose what you want to do.
repair_options: Do not save this as memory.
Save it anyway as a one-time note: "Today's weather is cloudy."
Rephrase as a durable preference or fact if intended, e.g. "I prefer cloudy weather" or "My local weather pattern is often cloudy."
